song.title: Famous One
song.author: Chris Tomlin and Jesse Reeves
song.lyrics: [V1] . Am7 G C G . Am7 G And for all You've done and yet to do . C G With every breath I'm praising You . Am7 G Desire of nations and every heart . C D You alone are God, You alone are God [C] .G2 G/F# C2 You are the Lord the famous One, famous One .Em7 D C2 Great is Your name in all the earth| . G2 G/F# C2 The heavens declare You're glorious, glorious .Em7 D G2 Great is Your fame beyond the earth [V2] . Am7 G The morning star is shining through . C G And every eye is watching You . Am7 G Revealed by nature and miracles . C D You are beautiful, You are beautiful
